description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow set on a spacious, landscaped lot with a large front yard and a driveway leading to a garage. The structure features a flat roof, clean lines, and large windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, mature trees, and shrubbery, with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The backyard includes a small outbuilding or shed, and there are multiple outdoor seating areas and garden features. The front of the bungalow faces a street with parked cars, indicating its placement in a suburban or urban neighborhood. The overall design emphasizes open space, greenery, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens, set on a spacious lot with a driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and extensive green lawn with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, outbuilding or shed, and garden features with a fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side facade, additional lawn space, and the street running along the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and sides
